user.title: Dawarich
user.description: Please enter your Dawarich connection details.

api_key.title: Dawarich API Key
api_key.description: Please enter your Dawarich API key.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Dawarich
reauth_confirm.description: Your Dawarich API key for {host} is invalid. Please enter a new API key.

reconfigure_confirm.title: Reconfigure Dawarich
reconfigure_confirm.description: Update your Dawarich connection settings. Leave API key empty to keep the current key.

data.name: Name
data.api_key: API Key (leave empty to keep current)

init.title: Dawarich Options
init.description: Choose whether zone sync should run automatically and which Home Assistant zones should be sent to Dawarich.

device_tracker_unavailable.title: Device tracker unavailable
device_tracker_unavailable.description: The tracked entity `{device_tracker}` configured for {device_name} is not available. This may be because the entity has been removed or the integration providing it is not loaded. Please check the entity or reconfigure the Dawarich integration to use a different tracked entity.

api_unavailable.title: Dawarich API unavailable
api_unavailable.description: The Dawarich API at `{url}` is not reachable. The server returned status code {status_code} with error: {error}. Please make sure that your Dawarich server is running and is accessible.
